{{Quote|Bet we could arrange for him to be sold to the lava mines on Vanan…|One of Lumiya's guards, on Finn|<ref name="SW88" />}}
'''Vanan''' was a terrestrial astronomical object<ref name="SW88" /> located in the [[Atravis sector/Legends|Atravis sector's]] [[Vanan system/Legends|Vanan system]]<ref name="TEAOC" /> in the [[Western Reaches/Legends|Western Reaches]] portion of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="TEA" /> In [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]],<ref name="Date">''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' dates the events of [[Star Wars (1977) 88|''Star Wars'' (1977) 88]] to [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].</ref> when members of the [[Slaver/Legends|slaver]] group known as the [[Herdessan Guild]] working for the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lady]] [[Lumiya]] captured a miscreant, [[Finn (Herdessan)|Finn]], [[Unidentified Herdessan Guild guard 1|one]] of them suggested selling the offender as a [[Slavery/Legends|slave]] to work in the [[Magma/Legends|lava]] [[Mining/Legends|mines]] on Vanan.<ref name="SW88" />

==Behind the scenes==
Vanan was mentioned in the [[Star Wars (1977) 88|eighty-eighth issue]] of [[Marvel Comics]]' [[Star Wars (1977)|''Star Wars'']] series, which was written by [[Mary Jo Duffy]]<ref name="SW88" /> and published on [[July 17]], [[1984]].<ref name="Marvel Age">{{BookCite|title=[[Marvel Age]]|number=Vol. 1 No. 16|publisher=[[Marvel Comics]] Group|date=[[July]] [[1984]]}}</ref> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Vanan [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore Vanan itself, in in grid square L-19.<ref name="TEA" />

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars (1977) 88|''Star Wars'' (1977) 88]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 88}} {{1stm}}
